_publications._publicationTitle: Cell of origin and microenvironment contribution for NF1-associated dermal neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: The tumors were circumscribed but unencapsulated, and contained abundant mast cell infiltration, and S100β+ and S100β- spindle-shaped cells in a disorderly arrangement
details: Successfully identified Schwann cells in neurofibromas, with tumors showing S100β+ and S100β- spindle-shaped cells in disorderly arrangement
